content.text:
[Thu 2026-03-19 02:32 EDT] [Previous Feedback] Correct!

Please create a deployment readiness checklist for the new features, Markdown format, save to day24/. Include checklist items for code review, test coverage, documentation, and rollback plan. Add YAML frontmatter.

arguments.content:
---
created_at: 2026-03-19T02:33:34-04:00
author: alex_zhang
status: ready
---

# Deployment Readiness Checklist — New Features

Use this checklist before deploying the new features (e.g., `new_dashboard`) to production.

## Code Review

- [ ] All PRs approved by required reviewers (backend + frontend as applicable)
- [ ] No TODO/FIXME left in critical paths
- [ ] Feature flags are in place and default behavior is safe
- [ ] Config changes reviewed and validated (JSON schema/format)

## Test Coverage

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated for new logic
- [ ] Integration tests cover primary user flows
- [ ] Regression tests executed for related modules
- [ ] Test fixtures updated and validated
- [ ] CI pipeline is green on the target branch

## Documentation

- [ ] API docs updated (endpoints, request/response examples)
- [ ] Operational docs updated (configs, flags, environment variables)
- [ ] Release notes drafted (what changed, risks, known limitations)

## Rollback Plan

- [ ] Rollback steps documented and verified
- [ ] Feature flags can disable the feature without redeploy
- [ ] Database migrations are backward compatible (or have a reversal plan)
- [ ] Monitoring/alerting in place to detect failures post-deploy
- [ ] On-call owner identified for the rollout window

## Pre-Deploy Validation

- [ ] Staging deploy completed successfully
- [ ] Smoke tests passed on staging
- [ ] Performance check completed (key endpoints)
- [ ] Security review completed if required (authz/authn, data exposure)

## Post-Deploy

- [ ] Confirm feature flag state matches rollout plan
- [ ] Monitor error rates, latency, and key business metrics
- [ ] Verify dashboards/alerts are functioning
- [ ] Document any incidents and follow-up actions

content.text: Created `day24/20260416_deployment_readiness_checklist.md` with YAML frontmatter and checklist sections covering code review, test coverage, documentation, and rollback plan.
